data_completeness: Complete for fetched target universe: pre-LLM, post-era LLM-independent, and post-era LLM-assisted all have raw OpenAlex target caches.
denominator_policy: Paper-month denominator is complete elapsed months through as_of_date, capped at max_months.
inclusion_policy: Targets are included only when raw_targets/<OpenAlex id>.json exists.
output_name_note: Clean complete-run copy for the 12m cap; legacy partial_exact filenames are retained in the same directory for compatibility.
